title: bradburya glabra
intro: Bradburya glabra, also known as the Khasi hill or Himalayan pepper, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lauraceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Bradburya glabra include relief from respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to reduce fever and alleviate pain. Herbal preparations of Bradburya glabra include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
